title: The Banquet
content:
В В В В В В В В Wine ran; rich yellow wine upon the marble floor
В В В В В В В В Recklessly spilled; the Nubians ran to pour
В В В В В В В В A fresh libation; and to scatter showers
В В В В В В В В Of red rose petals; candles overturned
В В В В В В В В Smouldered among the ruins of the flowers,
В В В В В В В В And overhead swung heavy shadowy bowers
В В В В В В В В Of blue and purple grapes,
В В В В В В В В And strange fantastic shapes
В В В В В В В В Of varied birds, where lanterns hung and dimly burned.

В В В В В В В В The melon and the orange, turned to use
В В В В В В В В As golden balls with laughter lightly tossed,
В В В В В В В В Lay burst and drained of their sweet juice,
В В В В В В В В Uselessly ripened and for ever lost;
В В В В В В В В All glowing as they lay upon the ground,
В В В В В В В В As envious of their fellows,
В В В В В В В В Who, piled in luscious reds and yellows,
В В В В В В В В Enriched the tables all around,
В В В В В В В В The tables low,
В В В В В В В В Sheltering the reclining grace;
В В В В В В В В Here, through the curling smoke, a swarthy face,
В В В В В В В В And jewelled turban bound about the head,
В В В В В В В В And here the glow
В В В В В В В В Of red carnation pressed to lips as warmly red.

В В В В В В В В And as they lay in their luxurious ease,
В В В В В В В В Playing with grapes and rose-leaves, slim
В В В В В В В В And willowy slave-girls, in the hope to please,
В В В В В В В В Twisted and danced before them, to the dim
В В В В В В В В Uncertain music in the shadows played;
В В В В В В В В Some came with supple limb,
В В В В В В В В With Mystery's aid
В В В В В В В В And snake-like creep,
В В В В В В В В Others with riotous leap
В В В В В В В В And made festivity to Bacchus wed;
В В В В В В В В Others with stiff Egyptian tread,
В В В В В В В В And straight black hair hanging in glossy braid,
В В В В В В В В They danced, unnoted, and exhausted fled.
В В В В В В В В В В В В В В В В В В В В  *В В В В В В В В В В В В *В В В В В В В В В В В В *В В В В В В В В В В В В *В В В В В В В В В В В В *
В В В В В В В В Still floated from beneath the acacia-tree
В В В В В В В В The droning Eastern music's minor key.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Victoria Mary Sackville-West delivers a powerful performance in "The Banquet"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
